allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/etymologyData.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('Total keys:', keys.length\); console.log\('First 3 keys:', keys.slice\(0,3\)\); console.log\('Sample key value type:', typeof d[keys[0]]\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./src/data/structure.json'\); let totalSub=0, totalFolders=0; s.forEach\(cat => { totalSub+=cat.subCategories.length; cat.subCategories.forEach\(sub => totalFolders+=sub.folders.length\); }\); console.log\('Categories:', s.length\); console.log\('Total SubCategories:', totalSub\); console.log\('Total Folders:', totalFolders\);")

PowerShell($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = \(Get-ChildItem Env: | Where-Object Name -eq "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Value\); if \($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\) { "API key is set" } else { "API key NOT set" })
